subcodes.first_line: The days of man and the life of the wise are even as a written book, an unfurled scroll, and a preserved tablet wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام انسان و حیات هوشمندان عبارت از کتاب مسطور و رق منشور و لوح محفوظست که در
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @bringing forth results; fruit, @high station of learning, @spiritual transformation
